steps.title: Identify customers who did not purchase gasoline
steps.content: From the Gasoline not purchased row (Total column), there are 50 customers who did not purchase gasoline out of 135 total customers.

steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
Probability is calculated as: $$P(\text{event}) = \frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}}$$

Therefore: $$P(\text{did not purchase gasoline}) = \frac{50}{135}$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
